data.title: WLFI multi-signature wallet withdrew $10 million USDC from Coinbase 3 hours ago and bought 200 million WLFI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, about 3 hours ago, the multi-signature wallet created by the Trump family's encryption project WLFI has withdrawn $10 million USDC from Coinbase to purchase 200 million WLFI.

data.title: Fed's Goolsbee: Rates can fall further once inflation falls
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed's Goolsbee said that once inflation falls, interest rates can be further reduced. (Jinshi)

data.title: Dutch companies Quantoz Payments, NPEX and Dusk will cooperate to launch digital euro EURQ
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Three Dutch companies, Quantoz Payments, NPEX and Dusk, announced that they have joined forces to launch the digital euro EURQ. This cooperation is the first time that NPEX, a stock exchange licensed by the Multilateral Trading Facility (MTF), has used electronic currency tokens (EMT) through a blockchain platform.
According to reports, the establishment of EURQ complies with the regulations of the Crypto Asset Market Regulatory Authority (MiCA). The cooperation involves licensed stock exchanges, EMT providers and blockchain foundations. The three Dutch companies said they are working together to build a bridge between traditional financial systems and blockchain-driven DApps.

data.title: DeepSeek related people refuted the rumors: the financing news is all rumors
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In response to the news that "DeepSeek is considering raising external funds for the first time" reported by foreign media, people related to DeepSeek refuted the rumor, saying that the financing news was all rumors. (Jinshi)

data.title: IRS To Lay Off Thousands Amid Tax Season Restructuring
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Internal Revenue Service (IRS) is set to lay off approximately 6,700 employees on Thursday. This restructuring could lead to staffing challenges during the crucial tax filing season. The affected employees are probationary staff, typically with one to two years of service at the agency, and they have fewer job protections compared to long-term employees. The IRS currently employs around 17,000 probationary workers.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Department: The IRS has canceled a $1.9 billion contract and will continue to work with DOGE to reduce waste
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Treasury Department issued a statement on X: "We work with DOGE to identify waste, fraud and abuse. To this end, the IRS canceled the previously planned $1.9 billion contract and promised to focus on and make rational use of taxpayer funds. We have included project SoW and FPDS entries for full transparency. We look forward to continuing to work with the DOGE team to work together to reduce waste."

data.title: Since the LIBRA incident, pump.fun's daily transaction volume and number of newly registered wallets have all declined.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Dune data shows that since the launch of LIBRA tokens, as of February 19, pump.fun's daily transaction volume (including purchases and transactions of newly issued tokens) has fallen 33.7% from $184 million to $122 million.
Pump.fun's growth has stagnated in other aspects besides transaction volume. On Tuesday, the platform registered only 59,000 new wallets, the lowest since November 17, 2024. On the day of President Trump's inauguration last month, the number of active wallets on the platform reached about 110,000.
Since Trump entered the White House, the number of new Meme coins launched on pump.fun has also dropped sharply, from 61,800 on January 20 to only 27,800 on Tuesday. (Decrypt)

data.title: IRS to cut about 6,700 jobs on Thursday
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A person familiar with the matter said that the IRS will lay off about 6,700 employees on Thursday, and this reorganization may cause the agency to be short-staffed during the critical tax filing season. The employees who are laid off are probationary employees. They usually work in the agency for less than one or two years and enjoy less job protection than permanent employees. The IRS has a total of about 17,000 probationary employees. (Jinshi)

data.title: Coinbase to List PYTH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Coinbase will add support for Pyth Network (PYTH) on the Solana network. Do not send this asset through other networks, otherwise funds may be lost. 
If liquidity conditions are met, trading will begin on or after 9 am (Pacific Time) on February 20, 2025. Once the supply of this asset is sufficient, the PYTH-USD trading pair will be launched in stages. Support for PYTH may be limited in some supported jurisdictions.

data.title: In the past 24 hours, the entire network has liquidated $134 million, and the liquidation amount of ETH exceeds that of BTC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past 24 hours, the entire network has been liquidated for $134 million, and a total of 68,503 people have been liquidated; among them, long orders have been liquidated for $55.3304 million, and short orders have been liquidated for $78.3248 million.
ETH liquidated $23.4063 million, exceeding BTC (liquidated $21.8535 million).
